title: "validateWorkspaceProposalProjectionReleaseMaterial()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Validate D472 release material and clone accepted DTOs before projection use.

Validation is fail-closed: malformed material is reportable through D473
diagnostics but cannot prune current-view state or satisfy policy checks.

## Import

```ts
import { validateWorkspaceProposalProjectionReleaseMaterial } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function validateWorkspaceProposalProjectionReleaseMaterial(value: unknown): WorkspaceProposalProjectionReleaseValidationResult
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns

Validation diagnostics or the validated projection.

## Example

```ts
import { validateWorkspaceProposalProjectionReleaseMaterial } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/work-item/workspace-family-applications.ts`
